subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from Us unto him whom God hath linked by ties of kinship unto one of His near servants. Verily, We bear witness that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من لدنا الی الذی نسبه الله الی احد من عباده المقربین انا نشهد بان
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @eulogies; reminiscences, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @soul; spirit after death, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @chastisement and requital
